title: Is there a way to create an item on the Target Board from a subitem, and also sync comments between from subitem to item?

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Folks,

A common challenge in monday is when you’ve got important info sitting in a subitem, but you actually need it as a FULL ITEM on another board.

For example, maybe a subitem in your Opportunities board should also live as an item in your Projects board — and you don’t want to manually recreate or update it twice.

That’s exactly what Mirror Item Multiple Boards app handles.

Your time is far more valuable than copy-pasting stuff. Let us help, so you can focus on what matters.

How it works -

  • You can either directly add a particular subitem as an item onto the board you want, or you can setup an automation like ‘When subitem created/status changes - mirror item to Target Board and Target Group’

  • Once the item is mirrored, any changes on the subitem or the linked main item automatically sync. You don’t have to manually setup any complex linking

  • Updates(comments, incl. replies) from the subitem to item and vice versa are also synced

image1890×1214 156 KB

The sync table will show you exactly where the item/subitem lives to make things easier.

This is only 1 use-case of the dozen more our Mirror Item Multiple Boards app handles including sharing the same item to unlimited boards, syncing updates(comments), and bulk creating items.

Centralize your designs (3)1920×960 194 KB

Just wanted to share in case it saves you some time. If you think this could fit your workflow, feel free to check it out or reach out with any questions.
